description_long: This object features a large, round pumpkin with a carved, menacing face, including sharply angled eyes and a jagged, toothy mouth. The pumpkin is perched atop a thin, elongated humanoid body with exaggeratedly long arms and legs, giving it a surreal and eerie appearance. The pumpkin's surface is ribbed and orange, with a short, brown stem at the top. The carved facial features are deeply cut, creating dark voids for the eyes and mouth. The humanoid body is fleshy and sinewy, contrasting with the smooth, hard pumpkin head. The overall look is reminiscent of a Halloween-themed creature, blending organic and fantastical elements.
description: A large, carved pumpkin with a sinister face sits atop a thin, elongated humanoid body, creating a striking Halloween-themed figure.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pumpkin's carved face with sharp eyes and jagged mouth, and the full humanoid body with long arms and legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the pumpkin's roundness, the depth of the facial cutouts, and the profile of the humanoid body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the uncarved back of the pumpkin and the back of the humanoid body, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the pumpkin's profile, the depth of the cutouts, and the side of the humanoid body.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional Halloween style with sharply angled eyes and a wide, jagged mouth filled with pointed teeth. The cutouts are deep and create a sinister, expressive face.
